commands.name: school
commands.description: Magic school: 0=Conj, 1=Alt, 2=Evo, 3=Const, 4=Ench, 5=Thau, 6=Blood, -1=not researchable.

commands.name: researchlevel
commands.description: Research level required to learn this spell.

commands.name: fatiguecost
commands.description: Fatigue cost encoded as gems*1000 + fatigue (e.g., 2050 = 2 gems + 50 fatigue).

commands.name: range
commands.description: Sets the battlefield range for this spell.

commands.name: precision
commands.description: Set the precision for this spell.

commands.name: aoe
commands.description: Area of effect in squares.

commands.name: damage
commands.description: Set the damage for this spell.

commands.name: effect
commands.description: Set the effect of the spell.

commands.name: nreff
commands.description: Sets the number of effects for this spell.

commands.name: provrange
commands.description: Sets the range of a ritual in provinces.

commands.name: prec
commands.description: Alternative precision setting.

commands.name: aoeinspector
commands.description: AOE value shown in inspector.

commands.name: damagemon
commands.description: Set a spell's damage to a monster (for summons).

commands.name: casttime
commands.description: Set the casting time. 100 is standard.

commands.name: speedmult
commands.description: Speed multiplier for the spell (1-3).

commands.name: maxbounces
commands.description: Maximum bounces for chain lightning type effects.

commands.name: nextspell
commands.description: Chain to another spell effect.

commands.name: nextingeo
commands.description: Chain spell takes effect if cast in this terrain (bitmask).

commands.name: flightspr
commands.description: Sprite or particle effect for spell flight.

commands.name: explspr
commands.description: Sprite or particle effect for explosion.

commands.name: sound
commands.description: Sound effect for the spell.

commands.name: strikesound
commands.description: Sound when spell strikes target.

commands.name: sample
commands.description: Custom sound sample file.

commands.name: spec
commands.description: Special spell flags bitmask.

commands.name: farsumcom
commands.description: Commander for farsummoned units.

commands.name: restricted
commands.description: Spell only available for this nation.

commands.name: notfornation
commands.description: Spell cannot be used by this nation.

commands.name: onlymnr
commands.description: Only this monster can cast this spell.

commands.name: notmnr
commands.description: This monster cannot cast this spell.

commands.name: onlyatsite
commands.description: Spell can only be cast at this site.

commands.name: onlysitedst
commands.description: Spell can only target this site.

commands.name: onlygeosrc
commands.description: Spell can only be cast from these terrains.

commands.name: nogeosrc
commands.description: Spell cannot be cast from these terrains.

commands.name: onlygeodst
commands.description: Spell can only target these terrains.

commands.name: nogeodst
commands.description: Spell cannot target these terrains.

commands.name: onlycoastsrc
commands.description: Spell must be cast from coast (0-1).

commands.name: onlyfriendlydst
commands.description: Target restriction: 0=any, 1=friendly only, 2=own only.

commands.name: onlyowndst
commands.description: Spell can only target own provinces (0-1).

commands.name: nowatertrace
commands.description: Ritual range cannot trace through water.

commands.name: nolandtrace
commands.description: Ritual range cannot trace over land.

commands.name: walkable
commands.description: Range must be walkable (0-1).

commands.name: godpathspell
commands.description: Divine spell for God's best path (-1 to 7).

commands.name: friendlyench
commands.description: Enchantment is friendly (0-1).

commands.name: hiddenench
commands.description: Enchantment not visible during battle (0-1).

commands.name: nocastmindless
commands.description: Mindless units cannot cast this spell.

commands.name: spellreqfly
commands.description: Only flying units can cast this ritual.

commands.name: polygetmagic
commands.description: Polymorphed unit gets target's magic.

commands.name: reqspellsinger
commands.description: Requires Spellsinger ability to cast.

commands.name: reqtaskmaster
commands.description: Only units with Task Master can cast.

commands.name: reqseduce
commands.description: Requires Seduce ability to cast.

commands.name: reqsun
commands.description: Cannot be cast when no sun present.

commands.name: reqplant
commands.description: Requires plant/tree to cast.

commands.name: reqnoplant
commands.description: Trees and plants cannot cast.

commands.name: sethome
commands.description: Sets caster's home province to current.

commands.name: dispimmune
commands.description: Enchantment immune to dispels (0-2).

commands.name: portent
commands.description: Portent message value.

commands.name: localglobal
commands.description: Localized global enchantment (0-1).

commands.name: worldvisible
commands.description: Enchantment visible worldwide (0-1).

commands.name: globallook
commands.description: Visual appearance of global (1-9).

commands.name: napbreakrit
commands.description: Ritual breaks non-aggression pact.

commands.name: sumhealaffs
commands.description: Number of afflictions healed by summoning.

commands.name: ainocast
commands.description: AI will never cast this spell (0-1).

commands.name: aibadlvl
commands.description: AI rating of how bad this spell is.

commands.name: aispellmod
commands.description: AI spell preference modifier.

commands.name: fatiguecostinspector
commands.description: Fatigue cost shown in inspector.

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clears the current spell.
